title: What Is Python?
description: Let's learn the Python programming language in a fun way!

scenes.speech: Hi! It's Garuchan! Today, let's learn Python together!
scenes.title: Welcome to Python!

scenes.speech: Python is not just a snake. It's a language for talking to computers!
scenes.title: Python = A Programming Language
scenes.content: Python is used to give instructions to a computer. It reads almost like English, making it perfect for beginners!

scenes.speech: When you write print, the computer can show words on the screen!
scenes.title: Show Text with print()
scenes.content: If you write print("Hello"), the screen will show Hello! Try it right now!

scenes.speech: Variables are like magic boxes that store things for later!
scenes.title: Variables = Magic Boxes
scenes.content: If you write x = 5, the box named x stores the number 5. You can use it anytime!

scenes.speech: if-else conditions are like yes-or-no questions for the computer!
scenes.title: Conditions: if / else
scenes.content: Computers can make decisions! If the condition is true, do this. Otherwise, do that!

scenes.speech: for loops help you repeat the same thing many times without getting tired!
scenes.title: for Loops
scenes.content: Instead of writing the same command 100 times, use for! The computer repeats it automatically.

scenes.speech: Functions are like recipes. You can reuse them again and again!
scenes.title: Functions = Magic Recipes
scenes.content: Write a function once, then call it whenever you need the same action. Clean, reusable code!

scenes.speech: Lists let you store many things in one variable!
scenes.title: Lists = Shopping Bags of Data
scenes.content: Think of a list like a shopping bag. You can put many items in and take them out one by one!

scenes.speech: With Python, you can build games, websites, AI apps, and so much more!
scenes.title: What Can You Build?
scenes.content: Google, Instagram, NASA, and YouTube all use Python. You can create amazing things too!

scenes.speech: Great job! You learned the basics of Python! Keep practicing!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
